title: Human-readable source title.
topic: Source topic label, such as general_history, cmu, events, food_events, sports.
document_type: Original document type from metadata, usually html or pdf.
local_path: Path to the raw downloaded file.
chunk_index: Zero-based chunk index within the source document.
text: Cleaned retrieval text for this chunk.
word_count: Number of whitespace-delimited words in text.
content_sha1: Short SHA1 hash for change tracking.
processed_at: UTC timestamp when preprocessing was run.
